topic: C0a sister-axis collision audits closed (3건) — F-RB-5 PASS WITH MITIGATION + F-VIROCAPSID-COLLISION PASS clean + F-NB-5 PARTIAL (cross-repo dependency)
verdict_detail: 3 sister-axis audits run in parallel via Explore agents 2026-05-05. Each compared its verb's hexa-bio canonical spec vs sister life/* canonical specs in canon. RIBOZYME and VIROCAPSID closed cleanly within hexa-bio scope. NANOBOT collision real but blocked on canon canonical-side acknowledgment (life/therapeutic-nanobot/) — out-of-repo dependency per (R1).

track_a_F-RB-5.vs_crispr: NO-COLLISION — hexa-bio RIBOZYME = catalytic-RNA architectural primitive (active-site σ=12 core, τ=4 reaction states, k_cat/K_M Eigen-Hammes ceiling); life/crispr-gene-editing = Cas9-sgRNA system integration + clinical delivery (downstream)
track_a_F-RB-5.vs_synbio: MITIGATION declared — handshake at SELEX/in-vitro selection: hexa-bio RIBOZYME owns design/kinetics step (L0-L4); life/synbio owns selection (SELEX) and metabolic-chassis embedding (L9 application)

track_b_F-VIROCAPSID-COLLISION.vs_virology: NO-COLLISION — hexa-bio VIROCAPSID owns cage geometry + assembly kinetics primitive; life/virology consumes cage as structural building block for diagnostic/surveillance/pandemic-response
track_b_F-VIROCAPSID-COLLISION.vs_vaccine: NO-COLLISION — life/vaccine consumes cage as particle for immunological formulation + clinical efficacy

track_c_F-NB-5.verdict: PARTIAL — COLLISION verdict, hexa-bio side declared
track_c_F-NB-5.collision_root: Both hexa-bio NANOBOT (single-molecule architectural primitive, atoms-level) and life/therapeutic-nanobot (integrated clinical-application system, drug+immune+delivery) claim n=6 invariant (σ=12, τ=4, φ=2, J₂=24) as load-bearing without acknowledging hexa-bio NANOBOT's prior registration (2026-04-28)
track_c_F-NB-5.hexa_bio_side: (N-R2) declared in .roadmap.nanobot — 'hexa-bio NANOBOT = single-molecule primitive (L0-L6); life/therapeutic-nanobot = integrated clinical system (L7-L9)'
track_c_F-NB-5.full_pass_path: Open canon session, apply 3 fixes, then update F-NB-5 status hexa-bio-side from PARTIAL → PASS

raw_91_c3_disclose: F-NB-5 cannot fully close from within hexa-bio per (R1) canon canonical 무수정. Closure requires separate session in ~/core/canon/.
Cross-repo edit pattern documented in memory/feedback_cross_repo_canonical.md.
F-RB-5 vs synbio mitigation is declarative (R-R2 boundary text) — actual SELEX integration would be life/synbio side work, not hexa-bio.
out_of_repo_handoffs: canon: F-NB-5 canonical-side fix (3 file edits + 1 joint kick)
